chapter_title.en: Chapter on Reviving Barren Lands and Properties

text: 3889 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ جَرَّاحٍ اَلْمَدَائِنِيِّ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ دَارٍ فِيهَا ثَلاَثَةُ أَبْيَاتٍ وَ لَيْسَ لَهُنَّ حَجْرٌ قَالَ "إِنَّمَا اَلْإِذْنُ عَلَى اَلْبُيُوتِ لَيْسَ عَلَى اَلدَّارِ إِذْنٌ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3889 - It is narrated from Jarrah Al-Mada'ini who said: I asked Abu Abdillah (as) about a house that contains three rooms, and these rooms do not have separate enclosures.
Imam (as) said: "Permission is required for the rooms, but there is no need for permission regarding the house."
